Off Calendar May-13-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, and CSR: Patricia Dowling.
Appearances: Douglas Holloway, Esq. For Plaintiff Trinity Capital Corp. also present.
Defendants not present.
Plaintiff witness, Ernest Knowles, V.P., was sworn and examined.
EXH. 1 - Lease agreement ---------ID/EVID.
EXH. 2 - Lease schedules------ID/EVID.
EXH. 3 - Personal guaranty-------ID/EVID.
The Court hears evidence and grants judgment in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants as follows:
Principal amount of $43,142.25, Interest $1,382.94, Costs $324.50, Attorney fee $2,500.00. For the total of $47,349.69
Does 1-10 are dismissed without prejudice.
Counsel stipulated for return of the exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.
